impactSites.name: Outside threat zone
impactSites.description: 8 drones fell outside the threat zone

impactSites.name: Military camp
impactSites.description: One of the camps was targeted

impactSites.name: Power Station
impactSites.description: Service building at one of the electrical power stations was targeted

alerts.title: 13 Hostile Drones Detected, Power Station Hit
alerts.description: Kuwaiti forces detected and engaged 13 hostile drones within 24 hours, resulting in damage to a service building at an electrical power station

alerts.title: Kuwait Air Defenses Engage Iranian Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwait air defenses engaged 14 ballistic missiles and 12 drones from Iran, resulting in targeting of a military camp

alerts.title: Kuwait Air Defenses Responding to Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses are currently intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks. Explosions may be heard as a result of interception operations.

alerts.title: Kuwaiti Air Defenses Responding to Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwait air defenses currently intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks. Any explosions heard are result of air defense systems intercepting hostile targets. Public urged to follow safety instructions.

alerts.title: Air Defenses Responding to Hostile Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defense systems are currently intercepting hostile missile and drone threats. Any explosions heard are from air defense interceptions. Public advised to follow safety instructions.

alerts.title: 15 Hostile Drones Target Kuwait Airport
alerts.description: Armed forces detected 15 hostile drones in the past 24 hours. Several targeted Kuwait International Airport vicinity, causing major radar system damage.

alerts.title: 4 Ballistic Missiles Intercepted, 7 Drones Detected
alerts.description: Kuwaiti forces intercepted 4 ballistic missiles in past 24 hours. 7 drones detected with 3 intercepted and 4 targeting vital installations. 1 cruise missile targeted Mubarak Port.

alerts.title: Kuwait Air Defenses Responding to Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses are currently responding to hostile missile and drone attacks. Any explosions heard are from air defense systems intercepting hostile targets. Public urged to follow safety instructions.

alerts.title: 6 Ballistic Missiles Detected in Kuwaiti Airspace
alerts.description: Kuwait Armed Forces detected 6 hostile ballistic missiles in Kuwaiti airspace in the past 24 hours, all fell outside threat zone. 1 drone was also detected and intercepted.

alerts.title: Kuwait Air Defenses Responding to Hostile Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses are currently intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks. Explosion sounds are from interception operations.

alerts.title: 20 Ballistic Missiles and 9 Drones Detected in 24 Hours
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses intercepted 13 of 20 ballistic missiles and 6 of 9 drones. 7 missiles fell outside threat zone, 1 drone fell outside threat zone, and 2 drones targeted civil installations.

alerts.title: Kuwait Air Defenses Responding to Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defense systems are currently intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks. Explosion sounds may be heard as a result of interception operations.

alerts.title: Kuwaiti Air Defenses Responding to Hostile Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses are currently responding to hostile missile and drone attacks. Explosions heard are result of air defense systems intercepting hostile targets. Public urged to follow safety instructions.

alerts.title: Kuwait intercepts 23 Iranian projectiles in 24 hours
alerts.description: Kuwait detected 17 ballistic missiles and 13 drones, successfully intercepting 13 missiles and 10 drones. Some debris fell in areas outside threat zones.

alerts.title: Kuwaiti Air Defenses Responding to Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses are currently intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks. Explosions heard are from air defense systems intercepting hostile targets.

alerts.title: Kuwait Air Defenses Responding to Hostile Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses are currently intercepting hostile missile and drone attacks. Explosions heard are result of air defense interceptions.

alerts.title: Ballistic Missile Intercepted Over Kuwait
alerts.description: Kuwaiti armed forces detected and intercepted 1 hostile ballistic missile in Kuwaiti airspace during the past 24 hours. No human casualties or material damage reported.

alerts.title: Kuwait Air Defenses Responding to Missile and Drone Attacks
alerts.description: Kuwaiti air defenses are currently responding to hostile missile and drone attacks. Any explosions heard are result of air defense systems intercepting hostile targets.

alerts.title: 7 enemy drones detected, 4 intercepted in 24 hours
alerts.description: Kuwaiti forces detected 7 enemy drones in airspace over past 24 hours, successfully intercepted and destroyed 4, while 3 fell outside threat zone
